findings.issue: Industry-standard English rendering is 'Common Frame of Reference (CFR)' for the IPA/SLCP common frame document; bare 'Common Frame' is a literal calque and may be opaque to English readers.
findings.recommended_fix: Consider 'Common Frame (SLCP Common Frame)' or annotate as such; not blocking since the JP surface itself is the colloquial '共通フレーム'.
